title: Universal Pot Lid Knob Compatible with Crockpot Lids, Pan Lid Replacement Handle, Heat Resistant Pot Knob for Glass, Steel Lids, Easy Grip Lid Handle, Kitchen Cookware, 2.75”x1.77”
description:
About this item
Superior Quality & Durability: Enhance your culinary experience with Nokess pot lid replacement knob. Made from highly durable and sturdy bakelite material, it outperforms easily breakable low quality plastic alternatives, ensuring long-lasting performance.
Heat-Resistant and Built to Last: Designed to withstand high temperatures, this universal pot lid handle for cookware & bakeware lids is a reliable kitchen companion. Its exceptional durability, resistance to wear, and high friction properties guarantee longevity.
Easy-Grip, Simple Care: Enjoy a comfortable grip while cooking, and it's as easy as can be to fix your lid and have instant replacement. Our pan lid handle is also dishwasher-safe and can be cleaned easily with a damp cloth.
Universal Fit for Versatile Use: This premium pan cover knob is a universal lid solution, suitable for pots, pans, casseroles, saucepans, canisters, and even glass or steel lids. Plus, our high–quality pan knobs are suitable for 6 mm mounting holes, ensuring compatibility with various lids of renowned brands. It's a hassle-free way to upgrade your entire kitchen.
Our Commitment to Your Satisfaction: If you're not completely satisfied with Nokess slow cooker lid handle, you can return it hassle-free, and we won't ask any questions about your refund.
reviews_5s:
My daughter melted my previous lid handle by placing the whole thing in the oven. I really thought I would have to just get a new crockpot but I decided to try this handle! Very affordable, nice and heavy duty and fits the lid perfectly! Good grip, easy to install and works great!My 15 year old crock pot lid handle broke last night and i found this, read all the reviews and it works and looks perfect!Fit perfectly, works beautifully.Perfect replacement piece for a broken crock pot handle. To be honest, this one seems to be much sturdier than the original. Easy to install, took like 2 minutes.We have lived for years without a crock pot handle for the lid, then suddenly thought we should check amazon. Great price, easy install. It fits great and it is amazing to have an actual lid handle instead of using pliers!! Wish we had thought of this and bought it sooner.Better than the original handle. Super easy to install. Strong and looks really nice as wellBought this to replace broken handle on lid for crockpot. Works great. Universal black. Sturdy, does not get hot. Washes easily.Dropped the lid of my small crock pot. And the handle/knob broke in pieces! This replacement lid knob couldn’t be more perfect! For the price it was a deal! Glad I purchased it.Simple replacement for an old handle that had broken. Didn’t want to buy an entirely new crock pot when an easy fix solved the problem.I bought this ro replace a 'knob' handle on a frying pan lid that fell of because the screw would no longer grab.

This handle is super easy to grab and hold, and the fastener portion is sturdy and looks and feels like it will not wear out over time or become loose.
reviews_1s:
The pot lid I received was in an old bag that had already been opened. The lid edge was broke and would not allow a good seal against the pan lid. I suspect what I received was a return from another customer due to damage. It’s a shame because it fit my lid like the original, appears very stout, and has metal threads to secure the screw.The product information provided with this knob represented it would fit a lid with a 6mm hole. I purchased this knob for a cast iron bacon press that uses a 6M X 1.25 set screw.

Surprise !

The knob sent to me uses a 5M X 0.8 screw!It didn't fit.Screw is too long.It said it would fit my pot but it in fact did not, misleadingThe screw that came with the lid was to wide to screw in.Looks like a great product. Kind of useless without a screw or washer. Should have came with it.It was perfect. I recieved 2 kinds. Great item will shop again!We received NO screw, NO silicon Gaskets,and NO Stainless Steel Washers !!
